steps.title: Rewrite the trig statement
steps.content:
The equation says the ratio of $\sin X$ to $\cos Y$ is $1$. Therefore the numerator and denominator are equal.
$$\frac{\sin X}{\cos Y}=1$$
$$\sin X=\cos Y$$

steps.title: Use complementary angles
steps.content:
For acute angles, $\sin X=\cos Y$ means the angles are complementary.
$$X+Y=90^{\circ}$$
Since $Y=31^{\circ}$, substitute that value.
$$X+31^{\circ}=90^{\circ}$$
